family_evidence.note: No direct publications found for this device, but 6 device(s) in the same product_code family (OWB) have 161 publication(s). These devices share the same FDA classification and intended use.

recalls.reason: Ortho images acquired with preset automatic horizontal flip are not flipped and when acquiring single images, there is the possibility that an image of a previous patient may be processed.
